EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Network {object.value} is attached to cluster "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to change network {object.value} of cluster "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Network {object.value} of cluster "{object.name}" is changed on host {event_src.host}
Failed to detach network {object.value} from cluster "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Network {object.value} is detached from cluster "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to attach network {object.value} to cluster "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
